allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\); const cssStart=html.indexOf\('<style>'\); const cssEnd=html.indexOf\('</style>'\); console.log\('CSS block present:', cssStart>0 && cssEnd>cssStart ? 'YES' : 'NO'\); console.log\('File size:', html.length, 'bytes'\);")
